name: Tolgee Localization Platform API
what_it_does: Open-source localization platform with REST API — providing in-app translation editing directly in the UI (click-to-edit), translation management via web platform or self-hosted server, SDK integration for React/Vue/Angular/Next.js, machine translation with DeepL/Google Translate, and CI/CD integration for automated translation workflows.
use_cases: Managing translation keys and strings for web apps via Tolgee REST API
Enabling in-context translation editing where translators edit strings directly in the live app
Integrating machine translation (DeepL, Google Translate) into translation workflows via API
Pulling translated strings for specific locales in CI/CD for automated builds
Managing translation projects and namespaces for multi-app localization platforms
not_for: Enterprise TMS with complex approval workflows (use Phrase or Smartling)
Document translation for legal or compliance content
Teams without developer involvement who need visual editor only
best_when: A development team wants open-source, self-hostable localization with in-context editing, modern SDK support (React, Vue, Next.js), and CI/CD integration without SaaS lock-in.
avoid_when: You need enterprise TMS features, complex translation memory management, or your team prefers fully managed SaaS without self-hosting.

auth.notes: API key from Tolgee account or self-hosted server. X-API-Key header or Bearer token. Project-scoped API keys with read/write scope control. No OAuth2. Webhook for translation change events. Self-hosted option gives full control over auth. Open-source (Apache 2.0) on GitHub.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Self-hosted: unlimited; Cloud free: 1,000 strings, 2 users
pricing.paid_tiers: Team $30/month (10,000 strings); Business $150/month (100,000 strings); Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Czech company (Prague). Founded 2021. Open-source Apache 2.0. Self-hosted with Docker. Tolgee Cloud for managed option. In-context translation is key differentiator — translators edit strings directly in deployed app. SDK for React, Vue, Angular, Next.js, Svelte, PHP. Machine translation auto-fill.

performance.rate_limits: Self-hosted — no external rate limits; Cloud: rate limits per plan

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for projects, keys, translations, languages, and imports. X-API-Key header with project-scoped keys. Good API documentation with OpenAPI spec. SDK for multiple frameworks. In-context editing via SDK screenshot upload. Self-hosted endpoint varies. Webhook for changes.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Translation reads fully idempotent. Key reads idempotent. Upsert operations idempotent by key name. Language reads idempotent. All read operations safe to retry.
known_agent_gotchas: Self-hosted URL varies per deployment — no fixed cloud URL unless using Tolgee Cloud
Project-scoped API keys — different key per project
In-context editing requires SDK integration in app — server API alone is insufficient
Machine translation requires configuring DeepL/Google credentials in project settings
X-API-Key header (not Authorization) — non-standard header name

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS configurable (self-hosted). GDPR compliant. EU data residency (Czech Republic). X-API-Key with project-scoped access. Open-source with community security reviews. Self-hosted gives full data control. Translation content may include user-facing strings — standard security practices.
